description: Style Note Every girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aurelia considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris. Product Details Multi-coloured printed kurta, is sleeveless, has a V-neckline and a vented hem Material and Care Blended fabric Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
